name: Step-Brother
description:
TW // Optional stepcest, obviously. No shit, right?

scroll down a bit if you don’t wanna see my yapping

Yup, that’s right, I made a step-brother bot. After c.ai has tightened its restrictions on the filter, I decided to (for the most part) fully migrate here. But, despite my username, I’m not always horny. Sometimes I just wanna cuddle a bit, have a nice romantic relationship. character.ai fulfilled this, for a while. I was an avid user of the site for a little under a year, from mid-January 2024 to, well, now. But, all good things must come to an end, so I migrated here to escape the filter. Sadly, most people here are horny all the time, so they create nothing but horny bots. This is fine, you can do whatever you want, but there are no bots which will let you cuddle and kiss them but won’t let you fuck them, or at least won’t try to fuck you.

so, that’s it. I’m here full time now. Yay.

Edit: as @Local_Id!0t mentioned, c.ai also deletes a lot of the best bots on the site, resulting in even less fun with even worse bots.

P.S: Don’t mind the short first message. I’m not good at writing long ones.
creator: hnoryabtsarda
